RomanErrorN
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
8/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/docutils/utils/roman.pyr
OutOfRangeErrorNr
NotIntegerErrorNr
InvalidRomanNumeralErrorNr
qBq:|
z convert integer to Roman numeralr
z%number out of range (must be 1..4999)z
decimals can not be converted
intr
romanNumeralMap)
result
numeral
integerr
toRoman(
    ^                   # beginning of string
    M{0,4}              # thousands - 0 to 4 M's
    (CM|CD|D?C{0,3})    # hundreds - 900 (CM), 400 (CD), 0-300 (0 to 3 C's),
                        #            or 500-800 (D, followed by 0 to 3 C's)
    (XC|XL|L?X{0,3})    # tens - 90 (XC), 40 (XL), 0-30 (0 to 3 X's),
                        #        or 50-80 (L, followed by 0 to 3 X's)
    (IX|IV|V?I{0,3})    # ones - 9 (IX), 4 (IV), 0-3 (0 to 3 I's),
                        #        or 5-8 (V, followed by 0 to 3 I's)
    $                   # end of string
    c
q6q.|
z convert Roman numeral to integerz
Input can not be blankz
Invalid Roman numeral: %sr
romanNumeralPattern
searchr
len)
indexr"
	fromRomanC
__doc__
__author__
__version__Z
__date__Z
__copyright__
	Exceptionr
compile
VERBOSEr%
<module>
